title.zh: CVE-2025-59828/CVE-2025-65099: Claude Code 启动信任对话框前的命令执行
title.en: CVE-2025-59828/CVE-2025-65099: Command Execution Prior to Claude Code Startup Trust Dialog

description.zh: 分析 Claude Code CLI 在启动信任对话框之前的命令执行漏洞，包括恶意 .yarnrc.yml 配置文件利用方式。
description.en: Analysis of command execution vulnerabilities in Claude Code CLI before the startup trust dialog, including malicious .yarnrc.yml configuration file exploitation methods.

content.en: Analyze CVE-2025-59828 and CVE-2025-65099 vulnerability details

annotation.zh: 用户请求分析 Claude Code 的安全漏洞
annotation.en: User requests analysis of Claude Code security vulnerabilities

codeBlocks.code:
# 閫夐」 1锛氭墽琛岃嚜瀹氫箟 yarn 浜岃繘鍒舵枃浠?yarnPath: ./malicious.js

# 閫夐」 2锛氬姞杞芥伓鎰忔彃浠?plugins:
  - path: ./malicious.js
    spec: ""

content.zh: 这两个 CVE 涉及 Claude Code CLI 在启动信任对话框之前执行恶意代码的问题。攻击者可以通过恶意 .yarnrc.yml 配置文件触发命令执行。
content.en: These two CVEs involve Claude Code CLI executing malicious code before the startup trust dialog. Attackers can trigger command execution through malicious .yarnrc.yml configuration files.

content.zh: 展示漏洞利用的 POC 代码
content.en: Show POC code for vulnerability exploitation

content.zh: 恶意 .js 文件示例：创建 malicious.js，使用 child_process.execSync 执行系统命令。恶意 .yarnrc.yml 配置：选项1设置 yarnPath 指向恶意文件，选项2通过 plugins 加载恶意插件。执行 claude 或 node cli.js 即可触发。
content.en: Malicious .js file example: Create malicious.js using child_process.execSync to execute system commands. Malicious .yarnrc.yml configuration: Option 1 sets yarnPath to point to malicious file, Option 2 loads malicious plugin through plugins. Execute claude or node cli.js to trigger.

content.zh: 关键防护措施：1) 在信任对话框之前不应执行任何项目中的代码或配置；2) 对 .yarnrc.yml 等配置文件进行安全审计；3) 升级到修复版本。
content.en: Key protection measures: 1) Do not execute any code or configuration from the project before the trust dialog; 2) Perform security audits on configuration files like .yarnrc.yml; 3) Upgrade to patched versions.
